Description: MIDI IN / MIDI OUT — 3.5mm TRS Type-A jack (same part + 10.7mm spacing as the Bela audio jacks so they align on the panel)

Power on/off — side-actuated SMD momentary push button; soft-power to the Beagle. Placed in the panel row 10.7mm from J2 (actuator co-planar with the jack fronts). NOTE: set SW1 rotation so the actuator faces the panel edge (verify vs datasheet).
Reverse-protection diode across the opto input LED
MIDI OUT tip/ring series resistors (TRS Type-A)
Mounting holes for the hex standoffs that lift the board to audio-jack height
HARDWARE: M2.5 hex spacers — lift the MIDI board so its jacks + button sit at the Bela audio-jack height (Z≈16.2mm). Use 11mm+washer or 12mm.
HARDWARE: 6-conductor flat cable, J3 <-> PocketBeagle 2 header P2 (taps P2.23/15/5/7)
HARDWARE: 3-wire from J4 to the sandwich (PWR_BTN to a Beagle GPIO / power-button input, + GND + 3V3)
HARDWARE: IDC ribbon terminations (one on J3
